ead.archdesc:
======= RMA01602Theta Delta Chi, Beta chapter records37-4-1602Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Theta Delta Chi, Beta chapter records
Theta Delta Chi. Beta Charge (Cornell University)
Coville, Luzerne.
Stull, Charles Rodman.
37-4-1602
5.9 cubic feet. 5.9 cubic feet.
1870-2015. Includes photographs, mostly of fraternity members; pamphlets about the fraternity; records of the fraternity's Building Fund Campaign; and other correspondence and miscellaneous records of Theta Delta Chi at Cornell University. Also includes scrapbooks kept by Luzerne Coville (Class of 1886) and Charles Rodman Stull (Class of 1907); and copies of the chapter newsletter, The Beta Bulletin, 1981-2015. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 51 - folder 1 ======= 51 - folder 1 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2074473
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
February 2018
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, February 2018
Date modified:
RMC Staff, February 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes photographs, mostly of fraternity members; pamphlets about the fraternity; records of the fraternity's Building Fund Campaign; and other correspondence and miscellaneous records of Theta Delta Chi at Cornell University. Also includes scrapbooks kept by Luzerne Coville (Class of 1886) and Charles Rodman Stull (Class of 1907); and copies of the chapter newsletter, The Beta Bulletin, 1981-2015.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Series 1: Financial Correspondence
Series II. Series II: General Documents and Correspondence
Series III. Series 3: Photos
Access Restrictions:
Access restricted to the president, secretary and librarian of Theta Delta Chi.
Cite As:
Theta Delta Chi, Beta chapter records, #37-4-1602. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
The Beta chapter of Theta Delta Chi fraternity was established at Cornell University on January 11, 1870.
Scrapbooks. Photographs. Greek letter societies. Cornell University -- : Societies, etc.
